code_smells.name: Long Function
code_smells.description: Functions exceeding 40 lines of code or multiple responsibility blocks.
code_smells.remedy: Extract nested blocks into standalone module-level helper routines.

code_smells.name: Deep Nesting
code_smells.remedy: Use guard clauses and early returns.

code_smells.name: Magic Numbers
code_smells.description: Unmapped literal numeric values inline in code logic.
code_smells.remedy: Extract into UPPERCASE constant definitions at module top.

code_smells.name: Circular Imports
code_smells.description: Mutual cross-import loops between local modules.
code_smells.remedy: Decouple into a dedicated shared utility module.

code_smells.name: Missing Memoization
code_smells.description: Uncached expensive operations inside React functional components.

code_smells.name: Unused Imports / Dead Code
code_smells.description: Imported modules or declared symbols that are never referenced.
code_smells.remedy: Prune unused imports and dead declarations.
